Package org.drip.historical.builder

Class GovvieStateEvaluation

java.lang.Object
org.drip.historical.builder.GovvieStateEvaluation
public class GovvieStateEvaluation
extends java.lang.Object
GovvieStateEvaluation contains the Instruments and the Govvie State evaluated at a Time Node, i.e., SOD/EOD. It provides the following Functionality:
  • GovvieStateEvaluation Constructor
  • Retrieve the Govvie Curve
  • Retrieve the Govvie Mark Suite
  • Retrieve the Array of Treasury Components

Module Computational Core Module
Library Computation Support
Project Historical State Processing Utilities
Package Latent State T1/T2 Builders

Author:
Lakshmi Krishnamurthy
